title: FuelCell Energy Inc (FCEL) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Revenue Surge Amidst Restructuring Efforts
text: FuelCell Energy Q4 2024 earnings call highlights showing revenue surge despite ongoing restructuring efforts. Q4 revenue increased 120% to $49.3 million, primarily driven by module sales to Gyeonggi Green Energy in South Korea. However, Q4 gross loss widened to $(10.9) million from $(1.5) million YoY. For full FY2024, revenue declined 9% to $112.1 million, with increased losses from operations at $(158.5) million compared to $(136.1) million in FY2023. Company's backlog increased 13.1% to $1.16 billion as of October 31, 2024. Company announced global restructuring plan targeting 15% operating cost reduction in FY2025, including 13% workforce reduction. Management commentary focused on three strategic pillars: distributed power generation addressing grid constraints, grid resiliency meeting AI data center power demands, and carbon capture recovery. Solid oxide technology positioning emphasized as key for future electrolysis and power generation growth. South Korea market success highlighted as significant opportunity with growing backlog from multiple Korean customers. Cash position strong at $318 million providing cushion for investment in manufacturing and product development. Forward guidance emphasizes data center power market opportunity as primary growth driver.
